title: Create: Rising Factory
description: This modpack contains all the most popular and elaborate addons for the large-scale mod Create. Create is a Minecraft mod by simibubi that allows you to create things and automate the process using rotational force.
body:
![title](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/bcac24a2d137446aeaf5f0e7b285370ddc24317f.png)
### Modpack Content

This modpack contains all the most popular and elaborate addons for the large-scale mod Create. Create is a Minecraft mod by simibubi that allows you to create things and automate the process using rotational force. The mod adds many mechanical components and block varieties. This mod has a great optimization system, which means it can be run on almost any PC!

**This mod adds:**

- oil production
- production of electricity from kinetic energy
- flying airplanes, floating ships, driving cars
- automatic enchanting of items
- automatic cooking
- big cannons
- rail, trains, cable cars

![create_trails](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b633750e264982ef9d1baa6381645b7857423327_0.webp)
![create_oil](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8ae4290c1ac9d7d662d3b8ca76bb84c3c1e4fdb3.jpeg)
### Optimization
- Sodium
- Lithium
- Memory Leak Fix
- Indium
- Ferrite Core
- Modern Fix
### Create addons
- Create Craft & Additions
- Create Big Cannons
- Create Slice & Dice
- Create: Steam 'n' Rails
- Create: Interactive
- Create Deco
